---
title: "Welcome to the Site"
date: 2026-06-01
categories: [news, opensees]
description: "Launching a Quarto site for research notes on nonlinear structural analysis and OpenSees."
author: Gustavo A. Araújo R.
---

Welcome! This site replaces my earlier personal page.

Here, you can expect research updates from the projects I am currently participating in, both in numerical and experimental research, as well as tips and examples on OpenSees and nonlinear finite-element analysis in general.

I leave you below with one of my favorite pictures from a test I did in Oregon. If you want to learn more about that project, go here: [Three-Story Mass Timber Building with Pivoting Walls](/projects/osu-three-story-pivoting-walls/index.qmd).

::: {.content-photo}
![](../../assets/images/about/osu-three-story-lab-2022.jpg){fig-alt="Gustavo A. Araújo R. leaning against the three-story mass timber pivoting-wall test specimen at the Oregon State University structural laboratory." width="640"}

Three-story mass timber pivoting-wall test specimen, Oregon State University structural laboratory.
:::

## Stay connected

- [Publications](/publications.qmd)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=rrMcW-UAAAAJ)
- [Contact](/contact.qmd)

Thanks for visiting!
